signals.headline: Bitcoin's 'Uptober' Streak Ends: October 2025 Closes Down 3
signals.raw:
Bitcoin's 'Uptober' Streak Ends: October 2025 Closes Down 3.6% for First Time Since 2018 | NO | HIGH confidence** [2][1]
